recovery.description: How to recover from this error

detection.description: How to detect this error condition

id.description: Stable identifier for this input (hyphen-delimited, matching protocol step id style). Used to bind to an output or supply from context when chaining skills.

required.description: Whether this input must be supplied. Defaults to true — only set to false for optional inputs.

inputItemDefinition.description: Single input entry: id (required, hyphen-delimited), optional description, required, and default

inputsDefinition.description: Inputs the skill expects from context: array of named items (mirrors output structure for deterministic binding). When a protocol step uses an existing artifact (e.g. loads from a path or file), the skill MUST declare one or more associated input entries that supply that artifact or path.

additionalProperties.description: Ordered list of imperative bullets for this step or phase.

protocolDefinition.description: Phase- or step-keyed procedure: each key is the step/phase name; each value is an ordered array of imperative bullets. Skill-level description is at the skill root, not in protocol.

oneOf.description: Array of related rules grouped under this key.

rulesDefinition.description: Named rules: each key is a rule name or group. Values can be a single rule string or an array of related rules. Note: workflow/activity schemas use a different format (string array of ordered imperative directives).

outputComponentsDefinition.description: Named output components: each key is a component id, value is the spec or description for that component (mirrors inputs structure)

name.description: Artifact filename when this output is persisted (e.g. 01-audit-report.md).

action.description: Whether this output creates a new artifact or updates an existing one

outputArtifact.description: Optional. When present, defines the artifact name to create when persisting this output.

id.description: Stable generic identifier for this output (hyphen-delimited, matching protocol step id style). Used when referencing as an input or elsewhere. Not a filename.

artifact.description: Optional. When populated, specifies the artifact name to create when persisting this output.

outputItemDefinition.description: Single output entry: id (required, generic hyphen-delimited), optional description, components, and artifact (for persistence)

outputDefinition.description: What the skill produces: one or more named outputs, each with optional name, description, and components

inputs.description: Positional input entries — each item is a single-key object mapping input name to its description

output.description: Output entries produced by this operation — same shape as inputs

procedure.description: Ordered imperative bullets describing how to perform the operation

tools.description: Map of source → array of tool names. Source is an MCP server name (workflow-server, atlassian, gitnexus, concept-rag, ...), or one of the reserved keys 'shell' (regular shell programs) and 'harness' (agent built-ins like Read, Write, AskQuestion).

resources.description: Resource refs (e.g., 'meta/05') this operation needs. Resources are scoped per-operation.

errors.description: Errors this operation can encounter, keyed by error name. Errors are scoped per-operation.

rules.description: Behavioural rules specific to this operation. Scoped per-operation so role-specific rules do not leak across orchestrator / worker bundles.

prose.description: Freeform markdown content for tables, examples, and reference material specific to this operation

harness.description: Harness-specific implementations keyed by harness name (cursor, cline, generic, …)

operationDefinition.description: A single named operation with description, inputs, output, procedure, tools, prose, harness implementations, and optional notes

operationsDefinition.description: Named harness-independent operations, each with a description, inputs, harness implementations, and optional notes. Used by capability skills (e.g. harness-compat) to define abstract operations that other skills reference.

capability.description: What this skill enables agents to do

resources.description: Resource indices or IDs this skill depends on (e.g. 02, 04, 08)
